Online shopping made easy

View all ways to shop

Get it delivered

We’ll deliver to your door*

*Subject to timeslot availability, T&Cs apply.

  • Free for shops over $250. Min spend $50.

  • Enjoy mid-week discounted delivery from Tuesday to Thursday

  • Book up to 7 days in advance 

Find out moreBook now

Pick up in store

Free same-day Click & Collect*

*Subject to timeslot availability, T&Cs apply.

  • Order by 2pm to collect same day

  • Select from over 770 locations Australia-wide

  • Min spend of $50

Find out moreBook now

Free delivery with Coles Plus*

Join Coles Plus and enjoy:

*Membership fee, exclusions and T&Cs apply

  • Unlimited free delivery over $50

  • Supercharged Flybuys points on your shops

  • Free Rapid Click & Collect over $30 (at selected areas)

Join now

Save with Coles Plus Saver*

Join Coles Plus Saver and enjoy:

*Limits, exclusions and T&Cs apply

  • 10% off one instore or online shop every calendar month (up to $50 off)

  • Link your Flybuys and enjoy double points on every shop

  • All for just $7 a month

Join & link Flybuys

More from Coles

Skip listing

  • Notice for products with recycling guidance

    Soft plastics are not being collected in-store or recycled due to REDcycle closure.

  • Free Cookware with credits*

    Earn one cookware credit for every $20 spent in one transaction with a linked Flybuys.

    *Earn credits until 12/5 and redeem by 19/5 (excl app). Exclusions and T&Cs apply.

  • Award-winning Coles Comprehensive Car Insurance*

    Protect your car with cover recognised for value, features and low cost.

    *Finder Awards 2025 & 2026. Standard underwriting criteria apply. 

Skip to top of listing

Shopping made easy with the Coles app

Order groceries on the go or use it in-store as a product finder. You'll see the aisle to go to.

Acknowledgement of Country

Coles Group acknowledges the Traditional Custodians of Country throughout Australia. We recognise their strength and pay our respects to Elders past, present and emerging. Coles Group extends that respect to all Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander peoples, and recognises their rich cultures and continuing connection to land and waters.

Explore our brands

^Spend $20 in one transaction and scan or link your Flybuys to receive one bonus cookware credit when you also purchase a selected product from a participating brand. Limit of one cookware credit applies per brand, per transaction. One additional bonus credit applies per Deliver More order. Excludes Coles Express, Uber Eats, liquor, tobacco, tobacco related product purchases, subscription fees, delivery fees and other purchases. Full T&Cs and exclusions apply. ©2026 KitchenAid. All rights reserved. Used under License.
No alcohol can be sold or supplied to anyone under 18. It's against the law. It's an offence to supply liquor to a person under the age of 18 years. All liquor products are sold and supplied by Liquorland (Australia) Pty Ltd. For more specific legislation in your state or territory, and to view our liquor and tobacco licences, visit our help page. To voluntarily exclude yourself from being able to purchase liquor online at Coles, please contact us.
